sections_cited: section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance

chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI ITRA 18 of 2014 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 09.02.2026 Mr. Muhammad Aqeel Qureshi, advocate for the applicant. Learned counsel, under instructions, does not press the reference application, which is hereby dismissed as withdrawn. A copy of this decision may be sent under the seal of this Court and the signature of the Registrar to the learned Appellate Tribunal, as required per section 133 of the Income Tax Ordinance, 2001. Judge Judge Khuhro/PS
